SEARCH
Package timgutilities.textio

Enum Class TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE>
timgutilities.textio.TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE>, Constable
Enclosing class:
TextIOUtils
@Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static enum TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE extends Enum<TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE>
Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
defined the various options that apply when entering numbers with upper / lowers. This enum is deprecated as it has been moved out into a separate enum class file NumberInputOption. For backwards compatibility methods with the old signatures still exist which do the conversion and call the real methods with the proper enums This enum will be maintained until at least version 2 of this package

  • Enum Constant Details

    • ANY_NUM

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE ANY_NUM
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      ignores the lower / upper limits

    • AT_OR_ABOVE

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE AT_OR_ABOVE
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      input must be >= lower limit, upper limit is ignored

    • ABOVE

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE ABOVE
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      input must be > lower limit, upper limit is ignored

    • AT_OR_BELOW

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE AT_OR_BELOW
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      input must be < = lower limit, upper limit is ignored

    • BELOW

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE BELOW
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      input must be < lower limit, upper limit is ignored

    • RANGE

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE RANGE
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      input must be >= lower limit and <= upper limit

    • SELECTION

      @Deprecated(forRemoval=true, since="1.0.16") public static final TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE SELECTION
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      the same a RANGE, but no restriction text is displayed

      public static TextIOUtils.NUM_TYPE valueOf(String name)
      Deprecated, for removal: This API element is subject to removal in a future version.
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
